results.term: I am doing ok.  How are you?

turn_info.content: I am doing ok.  How are you?

results.term: I have been struggling for motivation to do anythi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been struggling for motivation to do anything the past couple weeks.  This is a really hard time of year for me.  I lost my cousin in a car accident at the age of 14 in a car accident coming up on 20 years this year.  We were very close.  I was 17 at the time.  Her was an alcoholic and my parents raised her a majority of her life.  Then 3 years ago 5 days after her death anniversary I lost my boyfriend at the age of 32 in a car accident.  I dread the holidays.

results.term: You are exactly right.  The year my cousin got kil...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You are exactly right.  The year my cousin got killed her mom was hungover so I went and picked up my cousin and her little brother to take them to our grandparents house for Christmas dinner.  She died 4 days later on Dec 29th.  And my boyfriend it was his first day back to work after the New Year.  He died on Jan 3rd.

results.term: I usually go all out for the holidays to try to hi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I usually go all out for the holidays to try to hide my depression every year.  This year I just can't bring myself to enjoy them.  I have even bought one christmas present.

results.term: My cousin doesn't live around here and we have nev...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My cousin doesn't live around here and we have never been real close.  He is alot younger than me.  We just never had the connection like his sister and I did.  And both my grandparents have passed away.  Grandpa has been gone for 12 years and Grandma has been gone for 4 now.

results.term: My family has always been really good about talkin...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My family has always been really good about talking about our loses. Things just will never be the same.

results.term: They say it gets easier. And I agree it does.  Thi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They say it gets easier. And I agree it does.  Things just have changed so much.  I miss how life was before I lost them.

results.term: I love giving gifts.  And I always put lots of tho...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I love giving gifts.  And I always put lots of thought into the gifts I give.  My nieces and nephews can't wait every year to see what I got them.

results.term: This year I am tie dying hooded sweatshirts.  I ma...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: This year I am tie dying hooded sweatshirts.  I make tshirts for a hobby.  And to tell you the truth thats the only gifts I have gotten so far.  My oldest daughter turned 18 this year and lives with her boyfriend so its just me and my 15 year old daughter.  She struggles with depression/anxiety as well.  Her dad has been in jail for some stupid actions since August.  She has had to deal with him being an addict pretty much her whole life.  I think we are both missing how the holidays were with her sister still living at home.  Too much change in our lives in such a little time frame.

results.term: They will love them.  A couple years ago I put the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They will love them.  A couple years ago I put their names on fleece blankets when I worked at an embroidery shop.  They absolutly loved them!
